notable_new_prs_2026_07_01.author: 0xfullex
notable_new_prs_2026_07_01.significance: MAJOR — eliminates entire class of libsql workarounds (async-mutex, SQLITE_BUSY retry #288, pragma-replay patch); synchronous single-connection model; 1179 files / 13727 tests pass locally
